target.title: fix(discord): resolve redundant type constituents in native-command-route
target.body:
fix(discord): resolve redundant type constituents in native-command-route

Replace ReturnType-based type aliases with explicit non-any local types to eliminate oxlint no-redundant-type-constituents errors.

- Use ConfiguredBindingRouteResult directly instead of ReturnType inference
- Define EnsureConfiguredBindingRouteReadyResult explicitly

Fixes #80428

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Fixes #80428 — oxlint `no-redundant-type-constituents` errors in Discord native-command-route.ts caused by ReturnType-based type aliases that include `any` constituents.

- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw dev checkout on Linux x86_64, Node.js v20.12.2, oxlint 0.15.0.

- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
cd /tmp/openclaw-fork
npx oxlint@latest extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command-route.ts
```

- Evidence after fix (terminal capture):
Live terminal output from the actual patched file on local disk:

```
$ npx oxlint@latest extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command-route.ts
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Finished in 17ms on 1 file with 184 rules using 4 threads.
```

Screenshot: terminal showing oxlint zero errors after applying the type fix to native-command-route.ts.

- Observed result after fix:
- oxlint passes with zero errors for the modified file
- All three `no-redundant-type-constituents` errors eliminated
- TypeScript types compile correctly (ConfiguredBindingRouteResult imported directly)

- What was not tested:
- Discord bot runtime behavior (only static lint/typecheck verified)
- Other oxlint rules on the same file
- Full Discord extension test suite
